advantages: Ubiquitous and simple — pip and requirements.txt work everywhere.
One command recreates an environment (pip install -r).
Plain text, easy to diff and review.
disadvantages: requirements.txt alone doesn't lock transitive dependencies unless fully pinned.
pip freeze output is noisy and mixes direct and transitive deps.
No built-in dependency resolver guarantees across separate installs over time.
No standard separation of direct vs dev vs optional groups without conventions/extra files.
